verdict_note: Optional hands-free conversation mode ships beside the existing preview mode. It grants no new capability: it composes two already-authorized, click-gated actions (read-only Ask + read last answer aloud). Every spoken question is still classifier-gated.
goal: Add optional Alexa-style loop: click mic -> capture -> transcript -> auto Ask read-only -> receive answer -> auto read aloud -> ready, while keeping the existing preview mode unchanged.

mode_toggle.type: role=radiogroup with two role=radio spans (never real form controls)

shared_helpers: jvPostQuestion(q) - POSTs {question} only to /api/jarvis/ask, returns parsed JSON; reused by typed Ask flow and conversation mode
jvSpeakAnswer(onEnd) - reads ONLY jvLastAnswerText via SpeechSynthesis; cancels queued speech first; calls onEnd on finish/error/skip
jvRunConversation(transcript, setStatus) - ask read-only -> renderAsk -> auto read aloud -> ready; releases busy guard only when the whole turn settles
wireVoiceMode() - toggles spans + aria-checked, swaps hint, cancels in-flight speech, clears jvVoiceBusy on switch
wirevoice_changes: jvVoiceMode ('preview'|'conversation') and jvVoiceBusy single-flight guard state
start(): ignores click if listening||jvVoiceBusy (overlap guard); cancels active read-aloud (barge-in); wraps rec.start() to catch InvalidStateError with a calm retry hint
onresult: both modes fill input.value first; conversation mode sets convStarted=true and calls jvRunConversation; preview mode shows transcript-ready hint
onerror: resets listening/convStarted/jvVoiceBusy and shows per-code message

interruption_handling.barge_in: speechSynthesis.cancel() in start() and on mode switch
interruption_handling.aborted: distinct status, guards reset, typing still works
interruption_handling.start_race_invalidstate: caught; calm retry hint; busy guard released
interruption_handling.endpoint_failure: catch renders read-only error note, releases guard, returns to ready

test_results.invocation_note: Run from tests/ with PYTHONPATH=.. and --noconftest to avoid a pre-existing corrupt repo-root directory (on-disk name 'hydra ' = private-use char + trailing space) that breaks pytest root enumeration; unrelated to this change.

commit_note: Awaiting approval per bundle commit policy.
